case_title: FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION VS. VIRGINIA CHILTON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION REGARDING NON-SERVICE- NON ESTES FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION
CRC 3.740 REVIEW - DISMISSAL-ENTIRE ACTION ON FILE.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CHILTON, VIRGINIA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-02-2014
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION SERVED DEC-05-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHILTON, VIRGINIA
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT , CONDITIONAL, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 60936344)
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT ENTIRE ACTION, COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT
DECLARATION RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION
